economic_notes: Piapot First Nation Business Trust owns Cree Land Mini-Mart Limited Partnership and North Piapot Holdings Limited Partnership. First Nation has 8.3% interest in Keseechiwan Holdings Inc. (Swift Current Casino Development) and a non-controlling interest in 2544737 Ontario Limited (soft drink and ice manufacturing). Multiple specific claims initiated against Government of Canada for damages.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Province is Saskatchewan (Treaty 4 Territory). Consolidated entity includes 7 fully consolidated subsidiaries and 1 GBE (Piapot First Nation Business Trust and its investees) accounted for using modified equity method. Net debt position of $20.2M. New accounting policies adopted April 1, 2022: PS 3280 Asset Retirement Obligations and PS 3450 Financial Instruments. Asset retirement obligation of $640,832 recognized for housing containing asbestos. Multiple specific claims against Government of Canada noted in emphasis of matter paragraph (not qualified opinion). ISC total calculated as sum of all ISC funding lines including deferred revenue movements. Total government transfers includes ISC ($24,935,794) plus CMHC Rapid Housing ($1,860,112) plus CMHC Subsidy ($757,431) plus CMHC Rent ($244080) plus First Nations Trust ($936,825) = $28,734,242. OSR includes FHQ Tribal Council, rental income, interest income, earnings from GBE, and other revenue. Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text.
